steps.title: Focus on student order
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the order in which Marta Engelmann and Lotte Adler attended the Bauhaus. The notes say Engelmann began in 1920 and Adler began in 1930. A statement about directors or the school alone misses that student-to-student chronology.

steps.title: Choose the chronological statement
steps.content: Choice A lists both students without order, Choice B discusses directors, and Choice D mentions only Adler. The remaining choice states that Engelmann preceded Adler. The answer is C.
